title: 10 best herbal tinctures for jammed finger
description: Mullein tinctures helps with jammed fingers because of its anti-inflammatory and analgesic properties. The natural compounds in mullein, such as rosmarinic acid and flavonoids, work to reduce swelling and ease pain in the affected area. This allows for increased flexibility and reduces stiffness, making it easier to move the finger freely again. Additionally, mullein's soothing effects can help calm irritation and discomfort, promoting a faster recovery from jammed fingers....
